name: PipelineTerraformDocsInstaller
description: Find in cache or download a specific version of terraform-docs and prepend it to the PATH
author: sethbacon

inputs.name: version
inputs.label: Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: The terraform-docs version to install (e.g. 0.20.0). Use 'latest' to install the current latest release.

inputs.name: downloadSource
inputs.label: Download source
inputs.helpMarkDown: Where to download terraform-docs from. Official downloads from GitHub releases (github.com/terraform-docs/terraform-docs).

inputs.name: registryUrl
inputs.label: Registry base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base URL of your terraform-registry-backend instance. Must use HTTPS. Example: https://registry.example.com

inputs.name: registryMirrorName
inputs.label: Mirror configuration name
inputs.helpMarkDown: The mirror configuration name in your registry backend. This is the {name} path segment in /terraform/binaries/{name}/... (e.g. 'terraform-docs').

inputs.name: registryAllowedHosts
inputs.label: Allowed download_url hosts
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional comma- or newline-separated allowlist of hostnames the registry's download_url is permitted to use (e.g. storage.example.com, or *.s3.amazonaws.com to allow any subdomain). When empty (default), the download_url host is trusted as returned by the registry. Set this to pin a compromised or misbehaving registry from redirecting downloads to an arbitrary HTTPS host.

inputs.name: mirrorBaseUrl
inputs.label: Mirror base URL
inputs.helpMarkDown: Base URL of your binary mirror. Must use HTTPS. Must serve files at the same path structure as the official releases (e.g. https://artifacts.example.com/terraform-docs, serving {base}/{version}/terraform-docs-v{version}-{os}-{arch}.{ext}).

inputs.name: requireChecksum
inputs.label: Require checksum verification
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled (default), fail if a SHA256 checksum is not available for the requested version/platform. Disable only for mirrors or registries that do not publish checksums.

outputVariables.name: terraformDocsLocation
outputVariables.description: The location of the terraform-docs binary that was installed on the agent.

outputVariables.name: terraformDocsDownloadedFrom
outputVariables.description: The source from which terraform-docs was downloaded: 'official', 'registry:<url>', 'mirror:<url>', or 'cache'.

messages.InputVersionNotValidSemanticVersion: Input version %s is not a valid semantic version
messages.TerraformDocsNotFoundInFolder: terraform-docs executable not found in path %s
messages.TerraformDocsDownloadFailed: Failed to download terraform-docs from url %s. Error: %s
messages.VersionNotFound: Unable to get latest version from source, using fallback version
messages.InsecureUrlRejected: Insecure URL rejected: %s. Only HTTPS URLs are allowed.
messages.RegistryRequestFailed: Registry request failed for %s. HTTP status: %s
messages.RegistryDownloadHostNotAllowed: Registry download_url host '%s' is not in registryAllowedHosts: %s
